## Problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that AssayPDF doesn't currently support? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the change. Be concrete: which CLI command, which module,

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you look at? Why isn't it a fit? -->

## Scope check

- [ ] This is **not** a new rule generator (use the "New rule coverage"
      template).
- [ ] This is **not** a new engine runner (open a discussion first to
      confirm engine licensing and CLI surface).
- [ ] This does not require redistributing GWG copyrighted material.

## Willing to implement?

- [ ] Yes, I'll send a PR.
- [ ] No, requesting only.
